case_title: MARCO ANTONIO VETRANO RAMIREZ VS. PODESTA CONSTRUCTION INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MATT PODESTA FILED BY DEFENDANT PODESTA CONSTRUCTION INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-23-2024 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,700.00 FILED BY VETRANO RAMIREZ, MARCO ANTONIO AS TO DEFENDANT PODESTA CONSTRUCTION INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00); REMARKS: THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT FOUND. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF VETRANO RAMIREZ, MARCO ANTONIO AS TO DEFENDANT PODESTA CONSTRUCTION INC.
DECLARATION RESET HEARING DATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF VETRANO RAMIREZ, MARCO ANTONIO
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY VETRANO RAMIREZ, MARCO ANTONIO PODESTA CONSTRUCTION INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-01-2024 ORDERED DESTROYED
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-23-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-08-2024 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50 SERVED JUL-15-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PODESTA CONSTRUCTION INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-23-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-23-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF MARCO ANTONIO VETRANO RAMIREZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PODESTA CONSTRUCTION INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MATT PODESTA. DEFENDANT INDICATES HE WAS SERVED AND IS READY TO PROCEED. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ALLYSYN OVERTON; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VETRANO RAMIREZ, MARCO ANTONIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PODESTA CONSTRUCTION INC. $6,509.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,584.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
